title: ManifestCommitter
description: The ManifestCommitter class is a subclass of PathOutputCommitter that is used to commit task attempts and job output in a fault-tolerant manner. It is used in conjunction with the ManifestCommitterOutputFormat class to write output data to a manifest file.
summary:

raw_response:
TITLE: ManifestCommitter

DESCRIPTION:
The ManifestCommitter class is a subclass of PathOutputCommitter that is used to commit task attempts and job output in a fault-tolerant manner. It is used in conjunction with the ManifestCommitterOutputFormat class to write output data to a manifest file.
